package.name: iOS Microsoft Word
package.releaseNotes: • General quality and performance enhancements.

package.name: iOS Microsoft Excel
package.releaseNotes: • General quality and performance enhancements.

package.name: iOS Microsoft PowerPoint
package.releaseNotes: • General quality and performance enhancements.

package.name: iOS Microsoft Outlook
package.releaseNotes:
This update includes performance improvements and bug fixes to make Outlook better for you.
Feel free to send us any comments or questions by going to Settings > Help & Feedback – we’d love to hear from you.

package.name: iOS Microsoft OneNote
package.releaseNotes:
This month’s update is bug fixes only.
Thanks for using OneNote! We listened to your feedback and updated the application with optimizations to help improve your note taking experience.
Having trouble? Send feedback in the app (OneNote->Settings->Send Feedback) Have an idea? Add to our feature suggestion box at https://aka.ms/onenotefeedback

package.name: iOS Microsoft OneDrive
package.releaseNotes:
We've been busy behind the scenes making OneDrive even better. Here's what's new and improved:
New
- Blended gallery: Personal OneDrive users can now view photos shared by others directly in their Photos gallery alongside their own. A guided setup and sharer selection let you choose whose photos appear. - AI-powered Memories titles: Your Memories now feature AI-generated titles for a more personal touch (English only). - Photo stacks: Similar photos are now grouped into stacks by default, making your gallery easier to browse.
Improvements & Fixes
- RAW and Live photo badges: Spot your RAW and Live Photos at a glance with new badge indicators in the gallery and photo viewer. - Breadcrumb navigation for albums: Albums now show a breadcrumb trail so you always know where you are. Shared items also display "Shared" as the top-level breadcrumb when browsing from My Files, Shared, and Offline. - Open in Loop: Open Loop documents directly in the Microsoft Loop app, or get a prompt to download it if it's not installed. - GIF playback: GIF images now play automatically when you open them in the photo viewer. - Sharer's name in shared folders: When you browse into a folder someone shared with you, their name now appears in the header so you always know whose content you're viewing. - File type icons in grid view: Non-photo files now display their file type icon in the grid layout, making it easier to find what you're looking for. - Sharing controls for albums: Managing access to your shared albums now features a refreshed experience. - Notifications for shared photos and albums: When someone shares a photo or album with you, the push notification now shows a thumbnail preview. - In-app purchases: Clearer error messages for common purchase issues. - General performance and bug fixes.
Thanks for using OneDrive! We're always working to improve your experience. If you run into any issues, just shake your device and tap "Send Feedback."

package.name: iOS Microsoft Windows App Mobile
package.releaseNotes:
In this release we made the following updates:
• Enabled AVD screen capture protection by leveraging Intune app‑protection controls. • Added a checkbox to the General settings to control the usage of UDP. • Audio from optimized Teams meetings will now play through iPhone speakers. • Terminated objects that were wasting processing cycles and memory. • Made behind-the-scenes updates to lay the groundwork for upcoming features.
If you encounter any errors, you can contact us via Settings > Submit Feedback.

package.name: iOS Microsoft Defender Security
package.releaseNotes: Bug fixes and improvements

package.name: iOS Microsoft Copilot
package.releaseNotes: Introducing the New Copilot: Your AI Companion This update includes an intuitive design with more digestible and faster answers, plus new features. Copilot Voice: Perfect for brainstorming, quick questions, or just venting. Copilot Daily: Start your day with a news and weather summary. Clean, simple, and easy to digest.

package.name: iOS Microsoft Loop
package.releaseNotes: • General quality and performance enhancements.

package.name: iOS Microsoft Warehouse Management
package.releaseNotes: This version of the Warehouse Management mobile app introduces the following fixes and improvements: •Fixed an issue that caused pages to render incorrectly when users navigated from the Item Inquiry page to Custom pages. •Fixed an issue where the Back button did not clear previously selected data when navigating between Item Inquiry pages. •Fixed an issue where the ConnectionSetting parameter was not taken in consideration in MDM environments •Fixed an issue where browser shortcuts appeared when users scanned a value. •Improved he diagnostic file collection flow. Users can now save share or save in a local folder, useful for kiosk mode situations. •Fixed an issue where, on the Movement flow’s Confirm page, users could not scan the license plate, only the last character of the barcode was shown. •Fixed a visual issue where Work List tile headers were not parsed correctly when containing special characters. •Fixed an issue in the Movement flow where the previous value was shown in the step banner on the wrong step.

package.name: iOS Microsoft Store Commerce
package.releaseNotes: Bug fixes and performance improvements.

package.name: iOS Microsoft Dynamics 365 Sales
package.releaseNotes: This version includes experience improvements and bug fixes so sellers can stay on top of their deals better than ever before.

package.name: iOS Microsoft Lists
package.releaseNotes: We fixed some bugs to improve the app experience.

package.name: iOS Microsoft Dynamics 365 Field Service
package.releaseNotes: Minor updates, bug fixes, and performance improvements.

package.name: iOS Microsoft Viva Engage
package.releaseNotes: This update includes stability enhancements and bug fixes to improve your overall experience.

package.name: iOS Microsoft Whiteboard
package.releaseNotes:
Thanks everyone for using Whiteboard. Here's what's new in this version:) Please keep the feedback coming y'all! Enjoy.
CHANGELOG * Fixes an issue where the daily drawing prompt wasn't refreshing in some cases * Adds 5 free generated drawing prompts daily for everyone * Usage and stability improvements
2.0 Additions and Improvements * Introducing SharePlay drawing, draw with others over FaceTime or Messages. * Introducing CreatorKit, get the most out of Whiteboard and support Indie development * Now you can zoom in and out on drawings and images! * Scroll around in freedom on the all new, expansive, drawing board. * Autorotate from portrait to landscape and back, or you can choose to lock orientation. * Drawing library, open and continue working on your recent drawings. * Add new drawing button, create a new drawing anytime. * Significant performance and stability improvements * Adds lock for drawing board zoom/pan/scroll * Many more excited things are coming * Stay tuned
- Jim
Issues, questions or suggestions? • jim@getwhiteboard.com
Like Whiteboard? • Please subscribe to CreatorKit to help support development • Please rate the app 5 stars so more people find it • Please share Whiteboard with a friend or family member to help get the word out. • Please email me jim@getwhiteboard.com and let me know how you're using Whiteboard, send me drawings, questions, concerns and feedback. • Please subscribe to my Youtube channel https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCSr7ecHz6AnGvbGJNJSODbw • Please send me your Whiteboard drawings on Instagram @getwhiteboard.

package.name: iOS Microsoft Edge AI Browser
package.releaseNotes: Welcome to Microsoft Edge! Here's what's new in this release: • Introducing a smarter Search Box that lets you upload images and files to ask Copilot in one place. • Ask Copilot in PDFs: Quickly send selected text from the PDF context menu to Copilot for instant insights and assistance. Upgrade now to enjoy a smarter, faster, and more productive Microsoft Edge.

package.name: iOS Microsoft Seeing AI
package.releaseNotes: This release includes several bug fixes to make your experience even better.

package.name: iOS Microsoft Planner
package.releaseNotes: We regularly release updates to the app, which include improvements for speed and reliability.

package.name: iOS Microsoft Azure
package.releaseNotes:
Thank you for using the Azure app. Our regular updates include performance improvements and bug fixes to make the app faster and more reliable.
Please reach out to us for any questions, concerns, or feature requests.

package.name: iOS Microsoft To-Do
package.releaseNotes: We fixed some bugs to improve the app experience.

package.name: iOS Microsoft Teams
package.releaseNotes: Bug fixes and performance improvements

package.name: iOS Microsoft Sharepoint
package.releaseNotes: Stability improvements and fixes.

package.name: iOS Microsoft Dynamics 365 Business Central
package.releaseNotes: • Bug fixes and performance improvements.

package.name: iOS Microsoft Power Apps
package.releaseNotes: • Bug fixes and performance improvements

package.name: iOS Microsoft Authenticator
package.releaseNotes: We're always working on new features, bug fixes, and performance improvements. Make sure you stay updated with the latest version for the best authentication experience.

package.name: iOS Microsoft Advertising
package.releaseNotes: Bug fixes and performance updates

package.name: iOS Microsoft Lens PDF Scanner
package.releaseNotes: · PPT Conversion Upgraded: Take photos and convert to PPT in one tap. · Improved full-screen preview for an edge-to-edge, distraction-free view. · Book Mode Optimized: Smoother auto page-turn capture for easier scanning. · Excel Conversion Improved: Detects and preserves stamps and images so key details aren't missed.

package.name: iOS Microsoft Work Folders
package.releaseNotes: • Bug Fixes

package.name: iOS Microsoft Power BI
package.releaseNotes: - Improved stability and fixed various bugs.​

package.name: iOS Microsoft 365 Admin
package.releaseNotes: As part of this release, Admins will now receive real-time notifications on their mobile devices when Copilot license requests are submitted — enabling quicker response and streamlined license management on the go.

package.name: iOS Microsoft Intune Company Portal
package.releaseNotes: We’ve been improving the stability of the Company Portal. This helps keep your information safe and makes the app work more efficiently.

package.name: iOS Microsoft Azure Information Protection
package.releaseNotes: Bug fixes

package.name: iOS Microsoft 365 Office
package.releaseNotes: • General quality and performance enhancements.

package.name: iOS Microsoft Skype for Business
package.releaseNotes: Bug fixes and performance improvements.
